name: prodivix
description: 可视化前端开发平台 - 从设计到部署的全流程解决方案

scripts.verify:g2:auth-server-runtime: pnpm run verify:g2:auth-server-golden && pnpm --filter @prodivix/server-runtime test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/workspace test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/runtime-core test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/runtime-remote test && pnpm run verify:g2:auth-server-live-mutation && pnpm run verify:g2:environment-secret-key-rotation && pnpm run check:core-boundaries
scripts.verify:g2:auth-server-live-mutation: pnpm --filter @prodivix/prodivix-compiler test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/web test && cd apps/backend && go test ./internal/config ./internal/modules/remoteexecution ./internal/platform/database ./internal/platform/http/middleware
scripts.verify:g2:isolated-server-import-graph: pnpm --filter @prodivix/prodivix-compiler exec vitest --config vitest.config.ts --run src/executableProject/isolatedServerFunctionProject.test.ts && pnpm --filter @prodivix/remote-runner-worker exec vitest --config vitest.config.ts --run src/serverFunctionArtifact.test.ts src/workerServerFunction.test.ts
scripts.verify:g2:isolated-server-auth-authority: pnpm --filter @prodivix/server-runtime test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/runtime-remote test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/runtime-remote-postgres test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/prodivix-compiler exec vitest --config vitest.config.ts --run src/executableProject/isolatedServerFunctionProject.test.ts && pnpm --filter @prodivix/remote-runner-control-plane test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/remote-runner-worker test && cd apps/backend && go test ./internal/config ./internal/modules/environment ./internal/modules/remoteexecution ./internal/platform/database ./internal/app
scripts.verify:g2:isolated-server-runtime: pnpm --filter @prodivix/runtime-core test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/server-runtime test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/runtime-remote test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/prodivix-compiler test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/remote-runner-control-plane test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/remote-runner-worker test && pnpm run check:core-boundaries
scripts.verify:g2:binary-assets: pnpm --filter @prodivix/assets test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/asset-delivery-host test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/workspace test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/prodivix-compiler test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/runtime-core test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/runtime-remote test && pnpm --filter @prodivix/golden-conformance test:g2-execution-matrix && pnpm --filter @prodivix/web test && pnpm run verify:g2:binary-assets:browser && pnpm run check:core-boundaries && cd apps/backend && go test ./internal/config ./internal/platform/database ./internal/modules/workspace ./internal/app
scripts.verify:g2:clamav-malware: pnpm --filter @prodivix/assets build && pnpm --filter @prodivix/asset-delivery-host build && pnpm --filter @prodivix/asset-delivery-host test:clamav-gate
scripts.verify:g1:browser: cross-env PRODIVIX_VERIFY_G1_BROWSER=1 E2E_BROWSER_CHANNEL=chrome turbo run test --filter=@prodivix/golden-conformance
scripts.lint: turbo run lint && pnpm run check:core-boundaries && pnpm run check:editor-hard-cut && pnpm run check:pir-current-boundary && pnpm run check:nodegraph-wire-contract && pnpm run check:property-test-names
scripts.publish:packages:dry-run: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @prodivix/shared publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @prodivix/themes publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @prodivix/ui publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:packages: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @prodivix/shared publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @prodivix/themes publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @prodivix/ui publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.release:packages:patch: pnpm run version:packages:patch && pnpm run publish:packages
scripts.release:packages:minor: pnpm run version:packages:minor && pnpm run publish:packages
scripts.release:packages:major: pnpm run version:packages:major && pnpm run publish:packages
scripts.format:all: pnpm run format:prettier && pnpm run format:go
